tickets.title: Migrate user authentication to OAuth2 flow
tickets.documented_state: Implementation started, token refresh logic pending. Frontend redirect handling added in latest commit.
tickets.discussed_state: Team agreed to use PKCE flow for public clients. Backend endpoints ready. Frontend integration 70% complete. Mobile SDK wrapper planned for next sprint.
comments: Need to handle token expiry edge case when user is offline
Redirect URI whitelist must be updated in staging before QA
Mobile deep-link callback scheme registered in app manifest
Consider adding silent token renewal for long-running sessions
tickets.confidence_reason: Ticket discussed across multiple segments with explicit ID references and detailed status updates from assignee

tickets.title: Database schema migration for multi-tenant support
tickets.documented_state: Schema design approved. Migration script v2 drafted with tenant_id column and composite indexes. Rollback script tested locally.
tickets.discussed_state: Migration blocked on production freeze window ending March 5. Rollback plan reviewed and approved. Staging dry-run scheduled for March 3. Data backfill strategy agreed upon: batch processing with 1000-row chunks.
comments: Rollback script tested locally but needs staging validation
Tenant isolation index must be created before data backfill
Estimated 4.2M rows to backfill — at 1000/batch that's ~70 minutes
Need monitoring dashboard for backfill progress
tickets.confidence_reason: Ticket discussed in two separate segments with detailed technical planning and explicit timeline commitments

tickets.title: Implement real-time notification service via WebSocket
tickets.documented_state: WebSocket server scaffold complete. Message schema defined. Client reconnection logic implemented with exponential backoff.
tickets.discussed_state: Demo shown during call — basic pub/sub working. Need to add authentication handshake and channel-based subscriptions. Load test target: 10k concurrent connections.
comments: WebSocket auth should reuse the OAuth2 token from CR31296872
Redis pub/sub as message broker for horizontal scaling
Client SDK needs TypeScript types for message payloads
Consider fallback to SSE for environments that block WebSocket
tickets.confidence_reason: Live demo shown during call with screen share. Ticket ID referenced in Jira board visible on screen.

change_requests.title: Add rate limiting to public API endpoints
change_requests.where: API gateway layer and individual route handlers
change_requests.what: Implement token-bucket rate limiting with configurable thresholds per endpoint and per-tenant quotas
change_requests.how: Use express-rate-limit middleware with Redis-backed store for distributed counting. Add X-RateLimit-* response headers.
change_requests.why: Recent load testing revealed unprotected endpoints vulnerable to abuse; compliance requirement for Q1 audit
change_requests.confidence_reason: Proposed in segment 1, refined in segment 3, formally approved by team lead during call

change_requests.title: Add structured logging with correlation IDs across services
change_requests.what: Replace console.log with structured JSON logging. Inject correlation ID at gateway and propagate through service calls.
change_requests.how: Adopt pino logger with custom serializers. Use AsyncLocalStorage for correlation ID propagation. Ship logs to ELK stack.
change_requests.why: Current logging makes cross-service debugging nearly impossible. Incident response time is too high.
change_requests.confidence_reason: Discussed as a follow-up improvement; no formal approval but strong consensus among engineers

action_items.description: Update staging environment redirect URI whitelist for OAuth2 integration testing
action_items.confidence_reason: Directly assigned during discussion with explicit confirmation and deadline of March 2

action_items.description: Run migration rollback script on staging environment and document results before production freeze ends
action_items.confidence_reason: Explicitly assigned with March 3 deadline confirmed by assignee

action_items.description: Prepare WebSocket load test environment and run 10k concurrent connection benchmark
action_items.confidence_reason: Discussed as next step after demo; assignee agreed but no specific date committed

blockers.description: Production deployment freeze until March 5 prevents schema migration rollout
blockers.confidence_reason: Freeze window dates explicitly stated and confirmed by team lead

blockers.description: Redis cluster memory capacity insufficient for combined rate-limiting counters and WebSocket pub/sub at projected scale
blockers.confidence_reason: Raised as concern during capacity planning discussion; needs profiling data to confirm

scope_changes.original_scope: OAuth2 migration covers web application only
scope_changes.new_scope: OAuth2 migration now includes mobile app, CLI tool, and WebSocket authentication
scope_changes.reason: Product team requested unified auth experience across all client types; WebSocket auth dependency identified during call
scope_changes.impact: Estimated 3 additional sprint points; requires PKCE implementation for public clients and WebSocket handshake auth module
scope_changes.confidence_reason: Scope expansion discussed and approved by product owner during the call

scope_changes.original_scope: Notification service supports email, SMS, push, and in-app channels
scope_changes.new_scope: Phase 1 limited to in-app WebSocket notifications only; email/SMS/push deferred to Phase 2
scope_changes.reason: Timeline constraints — team agreed to ship core functionality first and iterate
scope_changes.impact: Reduces initial delivery estimate by 2 weeks; external notification provider integration deferred
scope_changes.confidence_reason: Explicit agreement during call to phase the delivery; captured in meeting notes

file_references.context: New OAuth2 client implementation with PKCE support
Schema migration adding tenant_id column to core tables
WebSocket server entry point shown during live demo
Channel subscription logic for topic-based message routing

tasks_todo: Run migration rollback script on staging environment by March 3
Document rollback test results and share with team
Set up monitoring dashboard for backfill progress tracking
Review Redis capacity requirements for rate limiting and WebSocket pub/sub
tasks_waiting_on_others: Waiting on Mohamed to complete redirect URI whitelist update before end-to-end OAuth2 testing
Waiting on Sara to provide WebSocket load test results for capacity planning
decisions_needed: Decide whether to proceed with tenant isolation index creation before or after data backfill

completed_in_call: Reviewed and approved database schema design for multi-tenant support

your_tasks.summary: Primary focus is unblocking the database migration once production freeze lifts on March 5. Validate rollback procedures on staging by March 3. Secondary priority: review infrastructure capacity for Redis-dependent features (rate limiting + WebSocket pub/sub).

summary: Team discussed migration plan for OAuth2 authentication, multi-tenant database schema, and real-time notification service. OAuth2 scope expanded to cover mobile, CLI, and WebSocket auth. Database migration blocked by production freeze until March 5 — staging dry-run scheduled for March 3. WebSocket notification service demo was successful; Phase 1 scoped to in-app only. Rate limiting approved as new requirement. Structured logging proposed as cross-cutting improvement. Redis capacity identified as potential blocker for multiple features.
